site.name: LuminaSky
site.tagline: Paint the night sky with world-class drone shows.
site.description: LuminaSky designs and operates world-class drone light shows in Thailand and across Asia — weddings, concerts, festivals, brand activations, grand openings, and countdown events. Fully licensed by CAAT.
site.ogImageAlt: A LuminaSky drone light show painting a heart across the night sky

hero.title:
Paint the night sky
with world-class drone shows.
hero.subtitle: We choreograph hundreds of drones into living, moving artwork in the sky — for weddings, concerts, brand activations, and the moments your audience will tell stories about for years.
hero.imageAlt: Illustration of hundreds of drones forming a heart against a night sky

services.title: A drone show for every kind of moment
services.subtitle: From an intimate garden wedding to a city-wide countdown with crowds of a hundred thousand, we tailor each show to your venue, theme, and story.

wedding.title: Weddings
wedding.description: Surprise your partner with a love letter written across the sky — initials, hearts, a moving story. The moment guests will be talking about for years.

concert.title: Concerts & Festivals
concert.description: Synchronise drones with music, lasers, and stage lighting down to the frame. Elevate the artist's set into a one-of-a-kind spectacle.

corporate.title: Corporate events
corporate.description: Anniversaries, AGMs, annual parties — lift your brand logo into the sky on hundreds of drones and give your team a night to remember.

activation.title: Brand activations
activation.description: Designed to go viral. Every show is choreographed to land beautifully on camera and travel across social media after the night ends.

opening.title: Product launch & grand opening
opening.description: Open a hotel, a mall, a flagship store, or a product line with full 3D animation in the air — instantly capturing press and crowd attention.

countdown.title: Countdown & NYE
countdown.description: A clean, eco-friendly alternative to fireworks. Tell the story of your city — or your brand — at the stroke of midnight.

process.title: How we run a show
process.subtitle: From the day you reach out to the moment the last drone lands, we own every step so you can focus on your guests.

brief.title: 1. Brief & concept
brief.description: We talk through your theme, venue, audience, and story. Our creative team comes back with a concept deck within 5 working days.

design.title: 2. Choreography & design
design.description: Designers build a storyboard and a 3D preview synced to music, lighting, and pacing. You approve every frame before we go anywhere near the sky.

rehearsal.title: 3. Site survey & rehearsal
rehearsal.description: Our technical crew walks the site, files CAAT permits, assesses wind and obstacles, then runs a full dress rehearsal the day before the show.

show.title: 4. Showtime & aftermovie
show.description: On the night, full crew, full backup drones, full focus. We deliver your aftermovie in high resolution within 14 days, ready for press and social.

showcase.title: A recent show we're proud of
showcase.subtitle: Siam Paragon Countdown 2025 — a New Year's Eve over central Bangkok, choreographed with 500 drones for an audience of more than 80,000.

project.name: Siam Paragon Countdown 2025
project.result: Trended #1 on X overnight; the clip crossed 12M views within a week.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Still not sure? Send us a brief at hello@luminasky.show — we reply within one business day.

items.q: How far in advance should we book?
items.a: We recommend 45–60 days minimum so we have time to design choreography, file CAAT permits, and run a full rehearsal. Complex concepts should be booked 90+ days ahead.

items.q: What happens if there's rain or strong wind?
items.a: Every contract includes a weather contingency. If conditions are unsafe, we can delay the show within the same evening, or move it to a back-up date agreed up-front — at no extra cost.
LuminaSky handles all permits with the Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT), along with local authority and venue clearances. You sign one document; we do the rest.
Yes. We operate a special indoor fleet — quieter and safer — designed for hotel ballrooms, convention centers, and mid-size arenas.

items.q: What is the minimum drone count?
items.a: For a show to read clearly, we recommend 100+ drones. For smaller moments we can suggest alternative light-show formats.

items.q: What kind of venue do we need?
items.a: Roughly a 30×30 m take-off zone and clear airspace away from buildings and powerlines, sized to the fleet. We survey every venue before quoting.
Six things: drone count, show length, choreography complexity, venue, lead time, and extras like aftermovies or live social streaming.

cta.title: Ready to paint the sky for your event?
cta.subtitle: Send us a short brief today. We'll come back within one business day with an initial concept and an estimated budget — free of charge.
